headlines.headline: Ilval Financial announces breakthrough in precision manufacturing

sentiment.reasoning: A breakthrough in manufacturing suggests potential long-term efficiency gains but lacks immediate financial quantification.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
